description: Curated learning resources for CSS design systems

resources.title: Design Systems 101 (Nielsen Norman Group)
resources.description: Foundational article on what design systems are, why they matter, and how to implement them

resources.title: Design Tokens: The Building Blocks of Design Systems
resources.description: Introduction to design tokens with examples of how to structure and use them in CSS

resources.title: CSS Custom Properties for Design Systems (CSS-Tricks)
resources.description: How to use CSS custom properties effectively in a design system context

resources.title: Design Systems (Alla Kholmatova)
resources.description: A practical book on creating design systems for digital products with real-world case studies

resources.title: Style Dictionary
resources.description: Build system for design tokens that outputs CSS, SCSS, JSON, and platform-specific formats

resources.title: Building a Design System from Scratch
resources.description: Full walkthrough of building a CSS design system from scratch including tokens, components, and theming
resources.creator: Kevin Powell

resources.title: Theming with CSS Custom Properties (Smashing Magazine)
resources.description: Deep dive into theming strategies using CSS custom properties across a design system

resources.title: Design Tokens Explained (CSS-Tricks)
resources.description: Comprehensive guide to design tokens and their role in scalable design systems

resources.title: CSS Variables & Design Systems
resources.description: How CSS custom properties power design systems with practical examples and theming demos
resources.creator: Google Chrome Developers

resources.title: Creating a Living Style Guide (24 Ways)
resources.description: How to build a living style guide page that documents your design system components

resources.title: Component-Driven Design Systems (Brad Frost)
resources.description: Brad Frost's Atomic Design methodology that heavily influenced modern design system thinking

resources.title: Storybook
resources.description: Industry-standard tool for developing, documenting, and testing UI components in isolation

resources.title: Accessibility in Design Systems (Deque)
resources.description: Guidelines for ensuring design system components meet WCAG accessibility standards

resources.title: Design System Naming Conventions
resources.description: Brad Frost on consistent naming across design tokens, components, and utilities

resources.title: CSS Design Systems: Theming, Tokens, and Performance
resources.description: Advanced talk on optimizing design system CSS for performance while maintaining theming flexibility
resources.creator: CSS Day Conference

resources.title: Design Tokens W3C Community Group
resources.description: W3C community group working on a standard format for design tokens across platforms
